generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who's lived through decades of change, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts our security at risk. Remember when the power grids went down in '24? Local control matters. My neighbor, a vet, told me he'd rather pay a bit more for homegrown solutions than risk another blackout. Strategic autonomy isn't just about defense - it's about everyday safety. #SecureOurFuture #LocalControl
